questions.question: What is WizNote?
questions.answer: WizNote is an AI-powered note-taking app designed to help students and professionals organize, summarize, and study their notes more effectively. With features like automatic transcription, AI summaries, flashcards, and quizzes, WizNote transforms your notes into a powerful study tool.

questions.question: How do I create my first note?
questions.answer: Creating a note is easy! Click the '+' button or use the 'Create Note' option from the main screen. You can type your notes directly, record audio that gets transcribed automatically, or import existing documents. Your notes are automatically saved as you type.

questions.question: Is WizNote free to use?
questions.answer: Yes! WizNote offers a free tier with essential features including note creation, basic organization, and limited AI features. Premium subscriptions are available for unlimited AI features, advanced transcription capabilities, and priority support.

questions.question: Do I need to create an account?
questions.answer: Yes, creating a free account is required to use WizNote. This allows us to sync your notes across devices, keep them secure, and provide you with personalized features. You can sign up with your email or use Google Sign-In for quick access.

questions.question: How does AI transcription work?
questions.answer: WizNote uses advanced speech-to-text technology to automatically transcribe your audio recordings. Simply record your lecture, meeting, or voice note, and our AI will convert it to text. You can then edit, organize, and enhance the transcription with AI-powered summaries and key points.

questions.question: Can I create flashcards from my notes?
questions.answer: Absolutely! WizNote automatically generates flashcards from your notes using AI. You can review them anytime to test your knowledge. Premium users get unlimited flashcard generation and can customize the learning experience.

questions.question: How do quizzes work?
questions.answer: Our AI analyzes your notes and automatically generates quiz questions to help you test your understanding. Simply select a note and click 'Generate Quiz' to create multiple-choice and short-answer questions based on the content.

questions.question: Can I share notes with others?
questions.answer: Yes! You can share notes with other WizNote users or create public links for anyone to view. Shared notes maintain formatting and can be viewed by recipients even if they don't have a WizNote account (for public links).

questions.question: What is the AI summary feature?
questions.answer: AI summaries automatically extract key points and create concise overviews of your notes. This feature helps you quickly review important information without reading through entire documents. Premium users can generate summaries for all their notes.

questions.question: Can I organize notes with tags?
questions.answer: Yes! WizNote supports tags to help you organize your notes by topic, subject, or any category you choose. You can add multiple tags to each note and filter your notes by tags to quickly find what you need.

questions.question: How do I upgrade to Premium?
questions.answer: You can upgrade to Premium from your Settings page. Click on 'Subscription Management' or 'Join Premium' to view available plans and choose the one that best fits your needs. Premium plans are available on a monthly or annual basis.

questions.question: Can I cancel my Premium subscription?
questions.answer: Yes, you can cancel your Premium subscription at any time from the Subscription Management page in Settings. Your Premium features will remain active until the end of your current billing period, after which you'll be moved to the free tier.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards through Stripe, our secure payment processor. Payments are processed securely and your billing information is encrypted and protected.

questions.question: Will I lose my notes if I cancel Premium?
questions.answer: No, all your notes will remain accessible. However, you'll lose access to Premium-only features like unlimited AI generations and advanced transcription. Your existing notes and basic features will continue to work on the free tier.

questions.question: How do I change my email or password?
questions.answer: You can update your email and password from the Settings page. Click on 'Edit Profile' to change your email, display name, or other profile information. Password changes can be done through the 'Security' section.

questions.question: Can I delete my account?
questions.answer: Yes, you can delete your account at any time from Settings > Danger Zone > Delete Account. Please note that this action is permanent and all your notes and data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

questions.question: Why is my audio not recording?
questions.answer: If audio recording isn't working, check that you've granted microphone permissions to WizNote in your device settings. On mobile, ensure the app has microphone access. On web, allow microphone access when prompted by your browser.

questions.question: My notes aren't syncing across devices. What should I do?
questions.answer: Notes sync automatically when you have an internet connection. If sync isn't working, check your internet connection, ensure you're logged into the same account on all devices, and try refreshing the app. If issues persist, try logging out and back in.

questions.question: The app is running slowly. How can I fix this?
questions.answer: If WizNote is running slowly, try: clearing your browser cache (on web), closing and reopening the app, checking your internet connection, or archiving old notes you no longer need. If the problem persists, contact our support team.

questions.question: I'm getting an error message. What should I do?
questions.answer: First, try refreshing the page or restarting the app. If the error persists, note the exact error message and contact our support team through the Help & Support page. We'll help you resolve the issue quickly.

questions.question: Can I use WizNote offline?
questions.answer: WizNote works best with an internet connection for syncing and AI features. Some features like viewing and editing notes may work offline, but changes will sync once you're back online. AI features require an active internet connection.

questions.question: Which browsers are supported?
questions.answer: WizNote works best on modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience. For mobile, we have native apps for Android (iOS coming soon).

questions.question: Is my data secure?
questions.answer: Absolutely! WizNote takes security seriously. All your notes and data are encrypted in transit and at rest. We use industry-standard security practices and never share your data with third parties. Your notes are private and only accessible to you (unless you choose to share them).

questions.question: Who can see my notes?
questions.answer: Your notes are private by default. Only you can see them unless you explicitly choose to share a note with others. We don't access or read your notes except as necessary to provide our services (like AI processing).

questions.question: What data do you collect?
questions.answer: We collect only the data necessary to provide our services: your account information, notes, and usage data to improve the app. We never sell your data. For more details, please see our Privacy Policy, which you can access from the Settings page or footer.

questions.question: Can I export my notes?
questions.answer: Yes! You can export individual notes or all your notes from the Settings page. Notes can be exported in various formats including plain text, markdown, or PDF. This allows you to keep backups of your data.

questions.question: What happens to my notes if WizNote shuts down?
questions.answer: Your data belongs to you. We'll provide advance notice and export options if we ever need to discontinue the service. You can always export your notes at any time to keep local backups.

questions.question: Are my notes backed up?
questions.answer: Yes! Your notes are automatically backed up to secure cloud servers. This means your data is safe even if you lose your device. We maintain multiple backups to ensure data integrity and availability.

supportContact.description: Our support team is here to help you 24/7
